author: YETISM
title: Very solid app
content: This helped me stream music from YouTube into background apps and really helped me getting unreleased albums from various artists 👍

author: arth83mac
title: Doesn’t connect to cloud storage
content: I purchased this to connect to MEGA cloud. It refuses to sign in.

author: JosephO3
title: Tracks wouldn’t play
content: I love it but reason for 3 stars is for some reason my files wouldn’t play and i don’t know what to do

author: itooons
title: Works great! Recommended.
content: Does everything I need from a music player and better than other apps I have tried. I reported a bug that was quickly fixed and received a thank you email from the developer. So a great experience all round!

author: iBookScala
title: 🌟Perfect music app 🌟
content:
I’m delighted with this music app. I have a large collection of mp3s going back many, many years. This app allowed me to import and organise them within minutes - great work 👍🏻

Lots of features and a well-polished UI, this is a keeper for me. Apple Music app, take some notes 📝

author: Johnjoe100
title: Brilliant app
content: It’s  great for playing my music on any of my devices, awesome app keep up the good work 👍👍

author: MadHumam
title: Deleted tracks inconvenience!
content: Love the app, one if not the best around. The only reason for 4 stars is that when you want to delete a track forever from the list it is a nightmare. It is not straight forward and everytime you re load the app the track will shows up again. Would appreciate if you can apply straight forward deleted setting. No need to keep in library or whatsoever. Thank you

author: Sidmasters
title: Best music player
content: Be lost without it love it bought the upgrade,great for DJs and syncing ur music in Ur iPod or phone . Defo recommended for expert music lovers. There’s a range of cloud services u can add incl iCloud one drive Dropbox and mega.

author: Unhatched Tadpole
title: Okay but has some flaws
content: This is a pretty good app to listen to music. If you have music on anything like Google Drive or MEGA then you can upload them to EverMusic and you can listen to music offline and put them into playlists and everything. A major con for me is that, if you have songs in a playlist, at the end of the song, the next song will begin to play, overlapping the end of the song you were listening to. This is just a huge flaw for me and I really hate that part. Other than that, this is a really good app to listen to music. I would’ve given 5 stars if it wasn’t for that con.

author: Icefire shadow
title: Great
content: I was downloading every app I could find that would let me put my music on my iPad and none of them were very good until I found this one. I loved the layout and everything about it so I bought the full version which isn't something I do often. This is a really good music app that I would definitely recommend

author: Jim7368
title: Simple but performant
content: Great mp3 player with a few elementary functions. Notso great for rehearsing an instrument. If connecting to a cloud it happens too often that one is kicked out and needs to log in again.
